headline: James holds at 34.0 as Max comes charging (+4).
sub: James leads on 34.0, 3 clear of Rob. The day belonged to Max (+4), fueled by Switzerland knocking out Rob's Algeria in the Round of 32. Teddy (+2) and Nick (+2) also climbed. Out of the tournament: Austria (Nick), Croatia (Joe), Algeria (Rob). Stev (14.0) has ground to make up.
